name: count_person
nl: How many persons are in the database?

name: count_post
nl: How many posts are there?

name: count_comment
nl: How many comments does the database contain?

name: count_forum
nl: How many forums exist?

name: count_tag
nl: How many tags are in the database?

name: count_tagclass
nl: How many tag classes are there?

name: count_knows
nl: How many KNOWS relationships are there between persons?

name: count_likes_post
nl: How many times have persons liked a post?

name: count_has_interest
nl: How many HAS_INTEREST relationships connect persons to tags?

name: count_persons_male
nl: How many persons have gender male?
ref: MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.gender = 'male' RETURN count(p) AS c

name: count_persons_female
nl: How many female persons are in the database?
ref: MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.gender = 'female' RETURN count(p) AS c

name: count_persons_firstname_alice
nl: How many persons have the first name Alice?
ref: MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.firstName = 'Alice' RETURN count(p) AS c

name: count_persons_firstname_john
nl: How many persons are named John?
ref: MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.firstName = 'John' RETURN count(p) AS c

name: count_continents
nl: How many continents exist?

name: count_countries
nl: How many countries are there?

name: count_cities
nl: How many cities are in the database?

name: count_universities
nl: How many universities exist?

name: count_companies
nl: How many companies are there?

name: gender_histogram
nl: How many persons are there of each gender?
ref: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.gender AS gender, count(p) AS c ORDER BY gender

name: persons_in_city
nl: How many persons live in the city named 'Berlin'?

name: friends_of_alice
nl: How many friends does any person named Alice have in total?

name: posts_by_person_id
nl: How many posts were created by the person whose id is 933?

name: comments_by_person_id
nl: How many comments did the person with id 933 write?

name: tags_of_post_by_id
nl: List the names of the tags attached to the post whose id is 206158430210, ordered alphabetically.
ref: MATCH (p:Post {id: 206158430210})-[:HAS_TAG]->(t:Tag) RETURN t.name AS name ORDER BY name

name: forums_created_by_person
nl: How many forums does the person with id 4139 moderate?

name: person_interests
nl: List the tag names that the person with id 933 is interested in, ordered alphabetically.
ref: MATCH (p:Person {id: 933})-[:HAS_INTEREST]->(t:Tag) RETURN t.name AS name ORDER BY name

name: top10_firstnames
nl: What are the ten most common first names of persons, together with how many persons have each name? Order by count descending then first name ascending.
ref: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.firstName AS name, count(p) AS c ORDER BY c DESC, name ASC LIMIT 10

name: persons_per_country
nl: For each country, how many persons live in it? Return the country name and the count, ordered by count descending, limited to 10.
ref: MATCH (p:Person)-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]->(ci:City)-[:IS_PART_OF]->(co:Country) RETURN co.name AS country, count(p) AS c ORDER BY c DESC, country ASC LIMIT 10

name: posts_per_forum_top5
nl: List the five forums with the most posts: return the forum title and the number of posts, ordered by post count descending.
ref: MATCH (f:Forum)-[:CONTAINER_OF]->(po:Post) RETURN f.title AS title, count(po) AS c ORDER BY c DESC, title ASC LIMIT 5

name: avg_friend_count
nl: What is the average number of friends per person (counting each KNOWS edge once)?
ref: MATCH (p:Person) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[k:KNOWS]->(:Person) WITH p, count(k) AS friends RETURN avg(friends) AS avgFriends

name: message_length_stats_post
nl: What is the minimum, maximum and average length of posts?
ref: MATCH (p:Post) RETURN min(p.length) AS lo, max(p.length) AS hi, avg(p.length) AS mean

name: tags_interests_top10
nl: What are the ten most popular tags by number of persons interested in them? Return the tag name and the count, ordered by count descending then tag name ascending.
ref: MATCH (p:Person)-[:HAS_INTEREST]->(t:Tag) RETURN t.name AS name, count(p) AS c ORDER BY c DESC, name ASC LIMIT 10

name: friend_of_friend_count
nl: For the person with id 933, how many distinct friends-of-friends are there (excluding the person themselves and their direct friends)?
ref: MATCH (p:Person {id: 933})-[:KNOWS*2..2]-(fof:Person) WHERE NOT (p)-[:KNOWS]-(fof) AND fof <> p RETURN count(DISTINCT fof) AS c

name: ic2_recent_messages
nl: Given a start person with id 4139, find the most recent 20 messages created by any of their friends. Return the friend's id, first name, last name, the message id, content (or image file if content is empty), and creation date, ordered by creation date descending then message id ascending.
ref: MATCH (p:Person {id: 4139})-[:KNOWS]-(friend:Person)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(m:Message) RETURN friend.id AS friendId, friend.firstName AS firstName, friend.lastName AS lastName, m.id AS messageId, CASE WHEN m.content IS NOT NULL AND m.content <> '' THEN m.content ELSE m.imageFile END AS content, m.creationDate AS creationDate ORDER BY creationDate DESC, messageId ASC LIMIT 20

name: tag_cooccurrence
nl: Find the ten tags that most frequently co-occur with the tag named 'Augustine_of_Hippo' on posts. Return the tag name and the number of posts it shares with Augustine_of_Hippo, ordered by count descending then tag name ascending.
ref: MATCH (p:Post)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t1:Tag {name: 'Augustine_of_Hippo'}), (p)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t2:Tag) WHERE t1 <> t2 RETURN t2.name AS name, count(p) AS c ORDER BY c DESC, name ASC LIMIT 10
